sizing_rule.note: Use covariance matrix equation (6.06a) to solve for optimal portfolio weightings (X values) that minimize variance for a target expected return. This is a mathematical optimization approach to determine position weights across multiple assets based on their correlations.

source_rule_text: Use Equation (6.06a) to calculate portfolio variance by solving the covariance matrix to determine optimal portfolio weightings (X values) that correspond to a target expected return.
